review_title: An Essential AI Assistant for Senior IT Consultants and Automation Experts
description: My overall experience has been excellent. GPT-4 is now an essential tool in my IT consulting workflow. I rely on it for verified, technically sound advice backed by vendor documentation. Whether I’m writing Bash scripts, preparing audits, or building deployment strategies for Kubernetes or Oracle middleware, GPT-4 speeds up delivery while maintaining high quality. It adapts to the complexity of each project and has improved the way I deliver value to my clients.
author: Gustavo V.
pros: GPT-4 has significantly enhanced my productivity by assisting with technical documentation, automation workflows, and executive-level communication. Its ability to understand complex IT contexts — whether it’s Linux, AIX, Ansible AWX automation, database tuning, or middleware configurations — makes it feel like having a 24/7 technical consultant. The contextual memory and tone adaptation are key strengths that save valuable time.
cons: In some highly specific or legacy scenarios (e.g., older AIX systems or complex cluster deployments), I still need to double-check the output. I’d also like to see deeper native integrations with platforms like Grafana, Foreman, or Red Hat Satellite to streamline operations even further.

review_title: It's like having an army of interns on your side
description: It's insanely good. We use it for everything from answering support tickets to managing how conversations are scored within our software. It does the work of a hundred pairs of eyes.
author: Arjun K.
pros: - incredibly capable in a generalist way - fast and responsive - large context window - easy to steer / align
cons: - relatively expensive (until the last update to turbo) - access to multimodality (vision) was delayed - response times are slower than 3.5 (until the last update to turbo) - original context window was short (until update to turbo)

review_title: Pocket Super Genius
description: My total of all correspondence with gpt is hundreds of pages long. I’ve definitely noticed based off the responses when my gpt-4 was at its daily limit. There’s a noticeable increase in quality with gpt-4
author: raymond R.
pros: It is an expert in everything. It’s like talking to a super genius.. with the caveat that it can still be blind to certain things. It definitely excels in many areas if there isn’t too much complexity. And it gives back what you put in so don’t be too lazy with prompting.
cons: Sometimes it can seem like the chat will say anything as long as it sounds good. So it might steer you wrong just to look like a good product rather than identifying its own limitations and saying so.

review_title: Best app for educators and student
description: Good for generative ai Best for leaning and planning
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Speed in gathering Information More accuracy with real references
cons: Pricing is little bit high Information are sometimes inaccurate
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Enhancing productivity and getting almost perfect!
description: Overall good. Many progresses, but a lot more that could be done in terms of structures, quality of the answers (unbiased and with desired level of details, helicopter view vs deep-dive), etc.
author: Antonio P.
pros: Amazing capabilities for content creation, advisory, technical writing, coding, templates design and much more.
cons: Sometimes you can steer it off track, if you start to go in a direction it's often not able to do a step back, deconnecting and keeping the helicopter view. In those circumstances answers can get biased
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: If you don't know, get to know
description: Daily power user. It makes my day job easier and empowers me during my personal life too. Anyone who is not learning how to effectively use LLM's is going to fall behind very quickly.
author: Rufus R.
pros: Travel agent, fitness coach, tech support, philosopher, life coach, sounding board, business strategist, it's never been so easy to outsource your brain power.
cons: It'd be nice to have diagrams include in some responses.

review_title: Great responses which might result in epic failure without a verification
description: It goes very well, I think GPT-4 powers a large part of the daily activities, yet there is a constant worry about the reliability of the data. So a lot of time is spent on verification.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Versatility, integration with the other services and ongoing development of the new features like canvas and multiple GPTs.
cons: Looks easier to use than it seems. It requires some practice with prompts.

review_title: Great AI - Legendary - ground breaking
description: Wonderful, my first AI experience was with GPT and 4 looks, feels, smells, and tastes even better! Considering purchase but the price point is a bit steep in my opinion.
author: David Joseph Cooper B.
pros: It's flexibility and learnability, it's predictions, tonal voices, accuracy and simplistic usage. Overall excellent.
cons: Nothing comes to mind perhaps only the fact that it does not tell you the period of time you must wait until you can use it again once the free component has expired... I had barely scratched it's surface.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful Writing, Analysis, and Programming Assistance with Minor Caveats
description: Chat GPT is a powerful assistant that significantly enhances productivity and aids in various ta
author: Felipe S.
pros: Chat GPT has been an invaluable tool for various tasks, including email writing, spell checking, grammar correction, and providing useful insights for research and data analysis. It has also proven effective in programming tasks.
cons: It's worth noting that occasionally the generated responses may include inaccurate or nonsensical information. Therefore, it's advisable to review the answers before finalizing them.

review_title: Almost a substitution for a colleague
description: I used to work with Google search engine on many issues, for a large part of these issues I now use GPT-4.
author: Marek H.
pros: GPT-4 can provide answers to wide range of questions across many fields. This is a valuable asset when tackling problems at work or at home. It serves me as a collaborative partner when a work colleague is not available.
cons: To fully utilize the benefits of GPT-4 in profesional world, it is better to have understanding of the discussed field. It is also oriented towards text-based input, non-text queries are not available.

review_title: Es sorprendente
author: Lucila Z.
pros: me gusta mucho la rapidez y la calidad del procesamiento de datos de GPT-4 me permite realizar tareas que antes me tomaban demasiado tiempo en unos cuantos minutos. También me ayuda mucho en la planeación de contenidos dándome una tormenta de ideas muy productivas y acertadas. Casi no hay nada que no pueda hacer.
cons: hasta el momento no he tenido problemas de gran impacto con GPT-4 es importante poder brindarle los datos correctos, para que devuelva una respuesta adecuada.

review_title: La nuova frontiera dell'IA
description: GPT-4, da quando è disponibile al pubblico, ha reso la mia esperienza universitaria più semplice. Con la potenza dell'intelligenza artificiale, ho potuto chiedere se alcuni esercizi fossero giusti facendomi dare in output la soluzione con il risultato. La versione a pagamento ,inoltre, riesce a ricevere in input anche le immagini. Consigliatissimo
author: Gioacchino T.
pros: Rende la vita più semplice. Ottima per risolvere quesiti matematici o scrivere scalette. Possibilità di fare miliardi di richieste.
cons: Capita che a qualche domanda risponda in modo errato

review_title: El mayor avance de los ultimos años, y continua mejorando
description: Cada dia consulto diferentes cosas, ya sea por aprender o por generar Agentes que me ayuden en las tareas cotidianas y repetitivas
author: Alfonso M.
pros: Me parece increible la velocidad y lo natural del lenguaje en las respuestas asi como los resulrados. La incorporacion de Tareas, me ha parecido increible
cons: Por ahora, el precio. Aunque espero que se generalice y sea mas asequible

review_title: avoir un Chat (gpt) dans sa vie
description: Je suis très orientée résultats, cherchant à maximiser l’efficacité de mon temps et à structurer des propositions convaincantes pour mes partenaires commerciaux . GPT m'apporte des insights et des contenus pour renforcer mon positionnement Analyses chiffrées sur l’efficacité des recrutements Aide à la structuration de partenariats Rédaction de présentations de candidats et d’articles promotionnels Nos échanges sont construits autour de mes besoins spécifiques, qui évoluent au fil du temps. Cela montre que notre collaboration ne se limite pas à un aspect purement "technique" du recrutement, mais qu’elle s’inscrit dans une logique plus large de développement d’affaires et de valorisation d’image. Je vais droit au but, avec des demandes précises et concrètes. En retour, GPT propose des réponses adaptées et synthétiques et efficaces. Que ce soit pour structurer une offre de partenariat, rédiger un résumé candidat ou promouvoir un établissement, il me transmet un contenu clair, impactant et pertinent. Nos interactions montrent aussi une envie constante d’amélioration et d’innovation. Notre collaboration est une alliance entre stratégie, efficacité et adaptation, avec un objectif commun : optimiser mon temps et mes actions et développer mon activité à travers des contenus percutants et des approches ciblées.
author: sandrine B.
pros: la facilité d'utilisation , accessible à toutes et tous
cons: la limite d'utilisation en gratuit , cela est frustrant
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Gran avance en el desarrollo de la inteligencia artificial
author: Carla M.
pros: la fluidez con que responde, y lo acertado en sus respuestas a comparación de otros modelos de la competencia, sin duda GPT-4 ha mejorado la calidad de sus respuestas y por ende se convierte en el mejor aliado para tareas de procesamiento de información.
cons: Su costo suele ser un poco elevado a comparación de otros modelos, sin embargo es algo que vale la pena ya que devuelve respuestas mas acertadas.

review_title: GPT-4 Review
description: GPT-4 excels in generating high-quality content which has assisted me with complex tasks
author: Tawakalit A.
pros: GPT-4 can handle multiple tasks simultaneously, making it more efficient and It’s ability to reason and draw conclusions has significantly improved.
cons: Despite GPT-4 efficiency it may inherit biases present in its training data.

review_title: Un outil d’IA puissant et très utile
description: J’utilise gpt au quotidien, et c’est devenu un outil indispensable pour moi, que ce soit pour rédiger, brainstormer ou obtenir des explications claires. Même s’il y a encore quelques améliorations à faire sur la précision, ça reste un modèle d’IA super utile et efficace.
author: Clement D.
pros: Ce que j’aime avec gpt c’est sa capacité à comprendre des questions complexes et à donner des réponses plutôt pertinentes. Il s’adapte facilement à différents contextes et demandes. Que ce soit pour rediger, rechercher des informations ou iterer sur des idees, il fait le job de manière impressionnante.
cons: Parfois,il peut donner des réponses un peu vagues ou erronées, surtout sur des sujets très pointus. Il lui arrive aussi de se répéter ou de sortir des réponses qui manquent de précision.

review_title: An honest perspective
description: All in all I still use Chatgpt, especially the voice chat features
author: Edward D.
pros: Ease of use, the archiving of conversations and initial intelligence.
cons: The model gets worse with each update. Chatgpt lies and fights with me constantly now over things it didnt use to

review_title: GPT-4 model review
author: Viktoriia M.
pros: GPT-4 model provides fast and complex solutions. And it has free access.
cons: It's still developing and getting better, so some answers might need additional human look.

review_title: L'assistant quotidien
description: c'est un assistant qui fournie une bonne matière première ; je gagne beaucoup de temps
author: Jean-Baptiste M.
pros: Une fois les prompts maîtrisé, GPT-4 est l'assistant concepteur-rédacteur idéal
cons: son style est encore très académique, sans créativité
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: GPT4 empowers all employees in our business to 10x their impact across the business
description: Absolutely critical tool for fast growing companies who want to move faster.
author: Lucien H.
pros: GPT4 enterprise allows every employee across our business to streamline everything they do. We love how broad the tool is which gives us the flexibility to constantly discover new use cases from optimising photos to building datasets in a fraction of the time it would have taken previously. GPT4 gives everyone a sense of calm knowing they can use it for everything they do to speed up manual tasks giving them more time to decompress and do value work.
cons: They are lacking enterprise tooling that empowers us to truly understand how the tool is being used as an employer. I know this will come but at this point, we have pretty basic analytics on the usage of the tool across the company.

review_title: My free review of gpt4
description: This is my first-ever review, and I felt compelled to write it out of gratitude towards OpenAI, which has generously provided a free version of GPT. This tool has been instrumental in my journey from learning English from scratch to reaching the level where I can write this review. Born into a poor family in a developing country, life has been fraught with challenges. An accident that left me unable to continue my work as a welder was a significant turning point. During this difficult time, GPT became a beacon of hope, encouraging me to explore online opportunities and build a new path based on its insightful suggestions. GPT offered me a comprehensive understanding of artificial intelligence, tailored to my level of comprehension. It also played a crucial role in managing my depression by directing me to seek help from a specialist. It did so in a convincing manner, explaining in my language why providing a diagnosis would be unethical. This guidance marked a turning point in my journey, transforming it into a more enjoyable experience. I found myself eagerly asking both whimsical questions and serious ones, delighted by the assistance GPT provided. Its polite, non-discriminatory, and results-oriented approach was incredibly supportive. Initially, I opted for the paid version of GPT as a way to express my gratitude and contribute to the project. However, I soon discovered it to be indispensable for developing my new business idea. This includes learning Photoshop, how to write an email, adopting best practices in business development, understanding client relations, and even achieving harmonious inter-personal and family relationships. In summary, my experience with GPT has been transformative, guiding me through learning, personal growth, and the pursuit of new opportunities. Its impact on my life has been profound, offering not just a tool for language learning, but a companion in navigating the complexities of life and business. It's worth noting that I have never been in touch with OpenAI, and my review is completely independent.
author: Silviu Codrin M.
pros: t is less expensive for the delivered quality. It offers a free version, available to anyone with an email address and internet connection. For the first time, I get the feeling that a software/package is delivering everything I need for my personal and professional development.
cons: I do not have any cons at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The big door to AI
author: Francisco A.
pros: Chat gpt was my first experience with AI and arrived to stay. Is absolutely useful to ever you need in your every day routine. Yo can have always open if you need a second opinion of something, maybe is not what you were looking for, but being wfh this could help to have a wider vision of anything.
cons: Sometimes lack of speed and you can't log in.

review_title: For me, the next level in using AI
description: I believe this is the future. Of course, I don't know if it will be Chat GPT or another AI tool. But already it's incredibly easy to use, it can help with all kinds of situations, and it's exciting for me to know that I'm living in a time when something so big is starting.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: the GPT-4 model is definitely more creative than the 3.5 or earlier language models.I use the tool when I want to prepare the foundations for further use of the text in various situations.The quality of the text corresponds to the specification. It is true that "a stupid question gets a stupid answer" :-)
cons: Yes, it is important to ask the right questions, at the same time it is impossible to blindly trust. The language model often invents, gives unsubstantiated, unverified and perhaps difficult to verify information. And he apologizes often.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good tool, but needs good choice of software to work well for a normal user
description: A transformation in productivity, when used right.
author: Ben E.
pros: GPT-4 is much more creative and inventive than previous GPT versions.
cons: You're left on your own to figure out how to integrate it, luckily there is burgeoning ecosystem of productivity apps need nothing more than your API key.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
